events.title: Osu Rooftop After Hours
events.shortDescription: Accra's most intimate rooftop music experience. DJs, cocktails, city views.

events.title: Accra Tech Summit 2026
events.shortDescription: Ghana's largest annual tech conference. 50+ speakers, workshops, networking.

events.title: Chale Wote Street Food Fest
events.shortDescription: Free open-air street food festival at James Town beach. 30+ vendors.

events.title: National Theatre Arts Night
events.shortDescription: An evening of contemporary Ghanaian dance and spoken word.

events.title: Accra Marathon 2026
events.shortDescription: Ghana's premier road race. 5k, 10k, half and full marathon categories.

events.title: StartupAccra May Meetup
events.shortDescription: Monthly founder meetup. Pitch corner, investor intro, community drinks.

events.title: UX Design Workshop Accra
events.shortDescription: Full-day hands-on UX design workshop. Bring your laptop. Limited spots.

events.title: Kumasi Cultural Day
events.shortDescription: Celebrate Asante heritage with music, food, dance and crafts.

events.title: Highlife Night at Labone
events.shortDescription: Live highlife band, natural wine and good company in Labone.

events.title: Beach BBQ — Labadi
events.shortDescription: All-you-can-eat BBQ on the beach. Live band, cocktail bar, sunset views.

events.title: DevFest Accra 2026
events.shortDescription: Google DevFest Accra. Talks, workshops, codelabs. For all experience levels.

events.title: Artists Alliance Gallery Opening
events.shortDescription: New exhibition featuring 12 emerging Ghanaian visual artists. Champagne reception.

events.title: Kumasi Afrobeats Rave
events.shortDescription: The biggest afrobeats night in Kumasi. 4 DJs, 6 hours, one massive crowd.

events.title: Cape Coast Heritage Walk
events.shortDescription: Guided tour of Cape Coast Castle and town. Learn the history, feel the energy.

events.title: Fitness Festival Accra
events.shortDescription: Full-day fitness festival. Yoga, HIIT, crossfit, dance, healthy food market.

events.title: Social Media Masterclass
events.shortDescription: Build and monetise your personal brand on Instagram, TikTok and X.

events.title: Accra Jazz Underground
events.shortDescription: Ghana's best jazz quartet plays original compositions. Intimate, seated venue.

events.title: Takoradi Food Market
events.shortDescription: Monthly street food market in the heart of Takoradi. Local vendors only.

events.title: East Legon Business Mixer
events.shortDescription: Connect with Accra's top business leaders. Drinks, dinner, deals.

events.title: Kente Weaving Workshop
events.shortDescription: Learn traditional kente weaving from a master craftsman. Take home your creation.

events.title: Tamale Community Football Cup
events.shortDescription: 12 community teams battle for the Tamale Cup. Free entry. Food stalls available.

events.title: Osu Night Market
events.shortDescription: Accra's most iconic weekly night market. 50+ food stalls, live music, art.

events.title: Web3 Ghana Summit
events.shortDescription: Ghana's first Web3 Summit. DeFi, NFTs, digital assets and Africa's role.

events.title: Labone Brunch Club
events.shortDescription: Saturday brunch with free-flow cocktails. DJs, good vibes, great food.

events.title: Accra Film Festival — Opening Night
events.shortDescription: Opening night screening of Ghana's most anticipated films. Red carpet optional.

events.title: CrossFit Competition Accra
events.shortDescription: Open CrossFit competition. All levels welcome. Prizes for top 3 in each category.

events.title: Accra Poetry Slam Night
events.shortDescription: Monthly slam poetry competition. Sign up to perform or come to watch.

events.title: Kumasi Tech Meetup
events.shortDescription: Monthly tech meetup for Kumasi's growing developer community.

events.title: Ghana Natural Wine Tasting
events.shortDescription: Guided tasting of 8 natural wines with artisan cheese boards. 20 guests max.

events.title: Independence Ave Block Party
events.shortDescription: Accra's biggest community block party. Free entry, live music, art, food.

organizer_profiles.bio: Accra's premier rooftop and nightlife event company. Since 2019.
We run Ghana's top sporting events from marathons to fitness festivals.
Preserving and celebrating Asante culture through world-class events.
Arts and culture events from Cape Coast to Accra.
Kumasi's hottest nightclub promoter. Afrobeats, reggae, dancehall.
Bringing Takoradi's food scene to life through festivals and pop-ups.
Sports and community events in Northern Ghana.
Jazz, highlife, afrobeats — Osu's best live music.
Powering Ghana's tech ecosystem through conferences, meetups and workshops.
Developing sports culture in Tamale and Northern Ghana.
Curating Accra's finest food experiences. BBQs, wine tastings, brunches.

snippets.body: The rooftop vibes were unmatched. Kofi D absolutely went off around midnight. Will be there every month.
Best night out in Accra this year. The cocktails were strong and the music was even stronger.
Came with 3 friends, left with 10. The energy on that rooftop is something special.
The AI panel was worth the ticket price alone. Ghana's tech scene is genuinely growing up.
Super well organised. The fintech track was packed — wish they had more seats. 4.5/5.
Free festival but feels like a proper ticketed event. The jollof from Mama Lydia's stall is unforgettable.
Came hungry, left very happy. Perfectly organized. Go every time it runs.
Best brunch spot in Accra. The cocktails were perfectly balanced and the DJ set the right mood.
Kumasi really came out! The crowd was massive and the energy was something else.
DJ lineup was fire. Republic Bar knows how to pack a room. Already got tickets for the next one.
The guide was brilliant — brought real emotion to the history. Highly recommend for everyone.
Walking through the slave dungeons with proper historical context changed me. Must-do experience.
Contemporary Ghanaian dance is in an incredible moment. This show was proof of that.
My first marathon and I'm already signing up for the next one. Beautiful route through Accra.
Discovered my new favourite band tonight. The brass section hit different in that small venue.

for_you_u001.label: For You
for_you_u001.reasoning: Music-heavy feed based on 0.95 music score. Rooftop and nightlife events prioritized.
